workspace.title: Food Safety Compliance Assistant

actions.title: Use PinkPepper for the work operators pay for

virtualAudit.label: Run virtual audit
virtualAudit.body: Simulate an inspection, capture findings, and produce a CAPA-ready report.

requestReview.label: Request expert review
requestReview.body: Send the current conversation for specialist feedback before you rely on it operationally.

export.label: Export PDF/DOCX
export.body: Download the current conversation as a working document you can share or file.

haccpPlan.title: HACCP Plan
haccpPlan.intro: Great choice. I will ask a few quick questions, then generate a complete HACCP plan you can review and export.
haccpPlan.q1: What is your business type, location (country), and service style (e.g., dine-in, takeaway, manufacturing)?
haccpPlan.q2: What products/menu items are in scope for this HACCP plan?
haccpPlan.q3: List the main process steps from receiving to service/sale.
haccpPlan.q4: Which hazards are most relevant in your operation (biological, chemical, physical, allergens)?
haccpPlan.q5: What control measures and critical limits do you currently use (temperatures, times, checks)?
haccpPlan.q6: Who is responsible for monitoring, corrective actions, and verification?

cleaningSop.title: Cleaning and Disinfection SOP
cleaningSop.intro: Perfect. I will collect key operational details and then generate a practical SOP.
cleaningSop.q1: What type of premises/area is this SOP for (kitchen, bakery, production line, etc.)?
cleaningSop.q2: Which surfaces/equipment must be cleaned and how often?
cleaningSop.q3: What cleaning chemicals/sanitisers are used (including dilution/contact times if known)?
cleaningSop.q4: Who performs cleaning and who verifies sign-off?
cleaningSop.q5: What records/logs do you want included in the SOP?

tempLog.title: Temperature Monitoring Log
tempLog.intro: Understood. I will gather your monitoring setup and generate a ready-to-use log template.
tempLog.q1: Which equipment/processes need monitoring (fridges, freezers, hot holding, cooking, deliveries)?
tempLog.q2: What are your target limits/critical limits for each?
tempLog.q3: How often should checks be recorded (per shift, daily, hourly)?
tempLog.q4: Who records readings and who verifies them?

supplierApproval.title: Supplier Approval Procedure
supplierApproval.intro: Good choice. I will ask a few details and then produce a complete supplier approval procedure and forms.
supplierApproval.q1: What type of business and product categories do you buy from suppliers?
supplierApproval.q2: Which supplier risks matter most to you (allergens, traceability, authenticity, chilled chain, etc.)?
supplierApproval.q3: What documents/certifications do you require before approval?
supplierApproval.q4: How often do you review suppliers and what triggers re-evaluation?
supplierApproval.q5: Who approves suppliers and where are records stored?

allergenPolicy.title: Allergen Management Policy
allergenPolicy.intro: I will ask a few questions about your business and allergen handling, then generate a comprehensive allergen management policy.
allergenPolicy.q1: What is your business type, location, and service style (e.g., restaurant, manufacturer, retailer)?
allergenPolicy.q2: Which of the 14 major allergens are present or handled in your operation?
allergenPolicy.q3: How do you communicate allergen information to customers (menus, labels, verbal, etc.)?
allergenPolicy.q4: What cross-contamination controls and staff training measures are currently in place?

foodSafetyPolicy.title: Food Safety Policy
foodSafetyPolicy.intro: I will ask a few questions about your business, then generate a comprehensive food safety policy.
foodSafetyPolicy.q1: What is your business name, type, and location?
foodSafetyPolicy.q2: How many sites/premises do you operate and how many staff?
foodSafetyPolicy.q3: What are your key products or services?
foodSafetyPolicy.q4: Any specific standards or certifications you work to (BRCGS, SQF, etc.)?

traceabilityProcedure.title: Traceability Procedure
traceabilityProcedure.intro: I will gather details about your supply chain, then generate a complete traceability procedure with recall plan.
traceabilityProcedure.q1: What is your business name and type (manufacturer, retailer, caterer, etc.)?
traceabilityProcedure.q2: What products do you handle (raw materials, finished goods, ingredients)?
traceabilityProcedure.q3: What batch coding or labelling system do you currently use (if any)?
traceabilityProcedure.q4: Any additional requirements or known supply chain risks?

pestControlProcedure.title: Pest Control Procedure
pestControlProcedure.intro: I will ask about your premises and pest risks, then generate a complete pest control procedure.
pestControlProcedure.q1: What is your business name and type?
pestControlProcedure.q2: Describe your premises type and surroundings (urban, rural, near water, etc.).
pestControlProcedure.q3: What pest risks or past issues have you experienced?
pestControlProcedure.q4: Do you use an external pest control contractor? If so, who?
pestControlProcedure.q5: Any specific monitoring equipment in place (bait stations, fly units, etc.)?

staffTrainingRecord.title: Staff Training Record
staffTrainingRecord.intro: I will ask about your team structure, then generate a training matrix and record templates.
staffTrainingRecord.q1: What is your business name and type?
staffTrainingRecord.q2: How many staff do you have and what are the main roles (food handlers, supervisors, managers)?
staffTrainingRecord.q3: What training do you currently provide (induction, food hygiene certificates, etc.)?
staffTrainingRecord.q4: Any specific training gaps or topics you want covered?

wasteManagementProcedure.title: Waste Management Procedure
wasteManagementProcedure.intro: I will collect details about your waste streams, then generate a complete waste management procedure.
wasteManagementProcedure.q1: What is your business name and type?
wasteManagementProcedure.q2: What types of waste does your operation generate (food waste, packaging, oils, hazardous)?
wasteManagementProcedure.q3: What are your current waste collection arrangements and frequency?
wasteManagementProcedure.q4: Any specific waste reduction goals or local authority requirements?

personalHygienePolicy.title: Personal Hygiene Policy
personalHygienePolicy.intro: I will ask about your staff and facilities, then generate a comprehensive personal hygiene policy.
personalHygienePolicy.q1: What is your business name and type?
personalHygienePolicy.q2: How many staff and what roles are covered (food handlers, servers, delivery, etc.)?
personalHygienePolicy.q3: What protective clothing and handwashing facilities do you provide?
personalHygienePolicy.q4: Any current policies or issues around illness reporting or fitness to work?

cleaningSchedule.title: Cleaning Schedule
cleaningSchedule.intro: I will gather details about your premises and cleaning needs, then generate a complete cleaning schedule and plan.
cleaningSchedule.q1: What is your business name and type?
cleaningSchedule.q2: What areas/zones need to be covered (kitchen, storage, service, toilets, external)?
cleaningSchedule.q3: What cleaning chemicals and equipment are available?
cleaningSchedule.q4: What cleaning frequencies do you need (after each use, daily, weekly, monthly)?
cleaningSchedule.q5: Who is responsible for cleaning and who verifies it?

workspace.wizardCancelled: Document builder cancelled. You can start again from any starter card.
workspace.wizardGenerating: Perfect. I have enough information. Generating your full document now.
workspace.virtualAuditPlaceholder: Virtual Audit mode: describe scope, upload evidence, or ask for final audit report...

onboarding.tellUs: Tell us about your business so we can tailor the experience.
onboarding.businessTypeQuestion: What type of food business do you run?
onboarding.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
onboarding.personaliseNote: This helps personalise your compliance guidance. You can change it later in settings.

message_limit.heading: You've reached your daily message limit
message_limit.body: Upgrade to continue chatting with more usage on Plus or Pro.

image_limit.heading: Unlock photo analysis
image_limit.body: Analyze photos of kitchens, labels, and food products with Plus or Pro.

transcription_limit.heading: Unlock voice transcription
transcription_limit.body: Record questions hands-free and turn speech into chat instantly with Plus or Pro.

export.heading: Export your compliance documents
export.body: Download HACCP plans, SOPs, and audit prep as PDF or Word — ready to use or share.

review.heading: Get food safety consultancy
review.body: Get guidance and specialist support from a qualified food safety professional on Pro.

audit_mode.heading: Unlock Virtual Audit
audit_mode.body: Run a structured mock inspection with findings, CAPA actions, and an export-ready report.

review.title: Request Consultancy
review.whatToExpectBody: Consultancy is delivered by qualified food safety professionals. Feedback is returned as structured written notes via your dashboard.
review.scopeNote: Consultancy is scoped to the content of the selected conversation. Off-topic or out-of-scope requests may be declined.
review.fullReviewCostNote: Consultancy is tracked in 15-minute increments against your 2 monthly hours.
review.fullReviewWarning: This will use all 4 of your monthly review slots. You won't be able to submit additional reviews this month.
review.notesPlaceholder: Tell the reviewer what you want checked.
review.submittedBody: You'll receive an email when your review is picked up and when it's complete.

produced_pdf.label: Produced PDF
produced_pdf.desc: Review an exported PDF document generated by PinkPepper.

produced_docx.label: Produced DOCX
produced_docx.desc: Review an exported Word document generated by PinkPepper.

async_qa.label: Ask a Question
async_qa.desc: Get a written answer from a food safety specialist.

settings.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.
settings.billingDescription: Manage your subscription, update payment methods, or cancel.
settings.languageDescription: Choose your preferred language for the interface.
settings.chatbotLanguageDescription: Choose the language the AI assistant responds in. Defaults to English.
settings.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountConfirmBody: This will permanently delete your account and all your data, including conversations, documents, and settings. This action cannot be undone.
